full_name: Synthesis Planning And Rewards-based Route Optimization Workflow
type: Algorithmic decision-making framework for molecular design
purpose: To drive design cycles in molecular design with consideration of synthetic costs
key_features: Downselects molecules and their hypothetical synthetic routes from a pool of candidates
Balances information gain and synthetic cost
Captures the non-additivity of synthetic costs for a batch of molecules
Scales to candidate libraries of hundreds of molecules
Provides a unified framework for evaluating suggestions from virtual libraries, de novo design algorithms, and human experts
dependencies: Advances in generative modeling for design ideation

capabilities_shown: Balancing information gain and synthetic cost
Capturing non-additive synthetic costs for batches of molecules
Scaling to libraries of hundreds of molecules

builds_upon: Prior problem formulations for simultaneous selection of synthetic routes to multiple molecules
Integration of product and process systems design
title: An algorithmic framework for synthetic cost-aware decision making in molecular design
